channel.title: Home on Ayush
channel.description: Recent content in Home on Ayush

item.title: Putting Myself Out There
item.description:
Putting Myself Out There

10 Nov, 2024

Finally, after almost four years of postponing, I’ve gathered the courage to put myself out there and start writing publicly about the things that fascinate and intrigue me.

Since my freshman year of college, I’ve often heard from people I admire that I should write more openly. Yet, I never had the courage to do it. I’ve been a very private person, with no active social media presence, and have stayed away from sharing my opinions publicly on any platform.

item.title: About
item.description:
Hello again!

Thank you for stopping by.

I really appreciate you taking the time to learn more about me.

I’ve always been that curious kid, fascinated by the complexity of the world and constantly tinkering to understand it better. These days, my exploration happens through binary bits.

While I’ve always been drawn to the arts and humanities, destiny steered me toward technology. Now, I’m on the verge of graduating with a CS degree. Admittedly, it wasn’t love at first sight, but over time, I’ve grown to truly enjoy and value the field.

item.title: Reads
item.description:
Here are some books that I’ve read. All of them were good; some were great, and a few were remarkable.

Bookshelf

  • Phantoms in the Brain
    V.S. Ramachandran

  • The Precipice
    Toby Ord

  • A Brief History of Time
    Stephen Hawking

  • Destiny, Freedom and the Soul
    Osho

  • Four Thousand Weeks
    Oliver Burkeman

  • Mindfulness in the Modern World
    Osho

  • Man’s Search for Meaning
    Victor E. Frankl

  • The Journey of Being Human
    Osho

  • Ratan Tata
    A.K. Gandhi
